Field.Label: If IndigoSecrets.py exists at /Library/Application Support/Perceptive Automation/ and contains MQTT_BROKER / MQTT_PORT / MQTT_USERNAME / MQTT_PASSWORD, those take precedence over the values below. Use this section if you do not have IndigoSecrets.py.
Broker Host:
Field.Description: IP or hostname of Mosquitto broker (leave blank to use IndigoSecrets.py)

Field.Label: Use TLS:
Field.Description: Enable for brokers using TLS (typically port 8883)

Field.Label: Auto-create Indigo devices on discovery:
Field.Description: When a new Tasmota device is discovered, automatically create the matching Indigo device. Uncheck to discover-but-not-create (then add manually).

Field.Label: Force-enable Tasmota discovery on each device:
Field.Description: If a discovered device has SetOption147 enabled (discovery disabled), the plugin will issue SetOption147 0 to enable it. Off by default - respect device's existing config.

Field.Label: Log raw MQTT payloads (debug):
Field.Description: Useful when adding support for new device types. Off in production.
